scenarios.capability: Replace Node.js fs calls with Bun-native file I/O APIs
scenarios.reason: Code transformation is a static task; the produced file can be verified by inspecting which APIs are used.

scenarios.capability: Refactor raw SQL string interpolation to use prepared statements
scenarios.reason: SQL pattern transformation is deterministic and verifiable by code inspection without running the database.

scenarios.capability: Implement a Bun.serve HTTP server following Bun-native patterns
scenarios.reason: The produced server code can be evaluated against Bun.serve API patterns without network access.

scenarios.capability: Write a bun test suite using correct matcher and mocking APIs
scenarios.reason: Test file structure and API usage are verifiable by static inspection of the produced code.

scenarios.capability: Identify and fix shell command injection in Bun subprocess code
scenarios.reason: Security anti-pattern detection and code rewriting are static tasks fully verifiable from the produced output.
